text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We've made it. The Yasuda Kinen is today.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
And she's planning to run in the Takarazuka Kinen
in a few weeks too, right?! This is unprecedented!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
She's on the Triple Tiara tour, and she has a fairly
small frame to begin with... This is going to be
one tough month for her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Yasuda Kinen is another race that very few
Triple Tiara Umamusume have ever won.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
You know... I think she can pull this off... I mean,
this is Sweep Tosho we're talking about here.

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: She's gonna show us all some magic!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. That's right! You guys are starting to get
it too.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna win the Yasuda Kinen! And then...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna make my incantation even stronger and
use it to thrash the hero!
